schema.name: StreetClosure
schema.description: Street closure row from the Seattle Department of Transportation street closures dataset, describing one closed street segment and its active occurrence window.

closure_id.description: Derived stable identity for the closure row, composed from permit number, street segment key, start date, and end date.

permit_number.description: Identifier for the permit record granting authorization to close the street.

alternates.name: permit_number
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle street closures dataset.

permit_type.description: Type of permit, such as Block Party, Play Street, Farmers Market, or Temporary Activation.

alternates.name: permit_type
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle street closures dataset.

project_name.description: Short title used by Seattle to quickly identify the closure permit.

alternates.name: project_name
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle street closures dataset.

project_description.description: Longer description of the permit, including issuance notes and closure details.

alternates.name: project_description
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle street closures dataset.

start_date.description: Date on which the closure event begins, normalized to YYYY-MM-DD.

alternates.name: start_date
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle street closures dataset.

end_date.description: Date on which the closure event ends, normalized to YYYY-MM-DD.

alternates.name: end_date
alternates.description: Original field name in the Seattle street closures dataset.

sunday.description: Time period, if any, during which the closure occurs on Sundays between the start and end dates.

monday.description: Time period, if any, during which the closure occurs on Mondays between the start and end dates.

tuesday.description: Time period, if any, during which the closure occurs on Tuesdays between the start and end dates.

wednesday.description: Time period, if any, during which the closure occurs on Wednesdays between the start and end dates.

thursday.description: Time period, if any, during which the closure occurs on Thursdays between the start and end dates.

friday.description: Time period, if any, during which the closure occurs on Fridays between the start and end dates.

saturday.description: Time period, if any, during which the closure occurs on Saturdays between the start and end dates.

street_on.description: Street name of the closed street segment.

street_from.description: Name of the intersecting street at the low end of the closed segment.

street_to.description: Name of the intersecting street at the high end of the closed segment.

segkey.description: Identifier for the street segment that is closed.

geometry_json.description: Serialized GeoJSON LineString geometry for the closed street block.

alternates.name: line_string
alternates.description: Original GeoJSON geometry object in the Seattle street closures dataset.
